metadata.description: All public/city-owned buildings in Atlanta eligible for HVAC pre-cooling activation during 2026 FIFA World Cup match days. Covers 8 match dates June 15 – July 15, 2026.
metadata.ordinanceCoverage: Atlanta Commercial Buildings Energy Efficiency Ordinance — municipal buildings >10,000 sqft, commercial >25,000 sqft
metadata.validationPolicy: Fields without a specific source are labeled as estimated. Numeric fields are retained for app compatibility; Display fields show whether a value is estimated/source-supported/verified.
